description_long: This object is a life-sized model of a pigeon, featuring a plump, rounded body with a smooth, slightly matte surface. The bird's plumage is predominantly grayish-brown, with subtle shading and a faintly mottled texture across the wings and back. Its head is small and rounded, with a short, slightly curved beak that is pale yellow at the tip. The tail is short and tapers to a rounded end, while the wings are folded closely against the body, giving it a compact appearance. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall form and proportions are typical of urban pigeons commonly found in city environments. The surface appears soft and slightly textured, mimicking the look of real feathers.
description: A realistic, grayish-brown pigeon with a rounded body, short beak, and folded wings, resembling a common city bird. The surface is matte and subtly textured to imitate feathers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pigeon, highlighting its rounded body, folded wings, and short tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the broad back, wing contours, and the overall oval shape of the bird.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the other profile of the pigeon with visible beak and tail.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, beak, and chest, with the head and beak most prominent.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid grayish-brown with subtle mottling and shading
